docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAYES, SHANNON AS TO DEFENDANT HALL, CHUNDRA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
